---
name: Anomaly Report
about: Report a new map discrepancy or potential hidden structure
title: '[ANOMALY] Location Name or Coordinates'
labels: anomaly, pending-verification
assignees: ''
---

**Anomaly Coordinates**
- Latitude: 
- Longitude: 

**Category**
Please select the closest match:
- [ ] GHOST_BUILDING (In OSM, but not in Satellite)
- [ ] HIDDEN_STRUCTURE (In Satellite, but not in OSM)
- [ ] CENSORED_AREA (Intentionally blurred or pixelated)
- [ ] IMAGE_DISCREPANCY (Conflicting pixels between providers)

**Description**
Provide details on what you found and why you believe this is an anomaly.

**Providers Checked**
Which map providers have you checked?
- [ ] Google Maps
- [ ] Bing Maps
- [ ] Yandex Maps
- [ ] Apple Maps
- [ ] OpenStreetMap

**Screenshots / Evidence**
Attach screenshots isolating the discrepancy.
